headline: How The Lam Research (LRCX) Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets And Risks
summary: Lam Research sits in the spotlight after a series of analyst price target changes, with individual moves ranging from US$6 to US$105 per share. These shifts come as research firms reassess wafer fab equipment demand, earnings potential and how much investors might be willing to pay. This is highlighted by actions such as BofA adding Lam Research to its US 1 List, while others maintain more cautious stances. As you read on, you will see how these evolving targets shape the broader story and...

headline: Goldman Sachs Adds UnitedHealth to Its Conviction List: Is the Managed Care Comeback Real?
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) added UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) stock to its U.S. Conviction List, reiterating a Buy rating with a $435 price target. The firm argues UnitedHealth is nearing the bottom of its underwriting cycle in Medicare Advantage (MA), which represents 40% of its business. headline: How Recent Shifts Are Rewriting The Story For Visa (V)
summary: The latest analyst update nudged Visa model fair value estimate from US$396.83 to US$395.71, signaling only a very small adjustment to where the shares are pegged in updated work. That modest shift lines up with a research backdrop where some firms are lifting targets or highlighting Visa as a core payments holding, while others are trimming price targets and stressing valuation, growth resilience, regulation and new payment options. As you read on, you will see how these crosscurrents are...
